title: Magic Singing
description: Study and singing to release magics. Assist in survival or embark on adventures. Recruit partners and summon monsters.
body:
There are four categories and 37 types of magic here.

Synthesize three pieces of paper into a certificate, which can consume experience and teach various magic skills. A wooden stick and diamond can be used to create a magic wand, which consumes magic and can be released through singing.

Players can summon arcane servants or undead to help them fight, as well as summon fireballs, lightning, water currents, and absorb or deliver magic to targets. They can also arrange formations, fly, flicker, heal, and curse.

If you like to bring the door with you when you go out, you can learn spatial magic that allows you to pack and take away blocks in a space, and release them as they are.

The original tools have not been abandoned, and you can use magic to obtain props that have both sword, axe, pickaxe, hoe, and shovel functions.

Don't worry about magic, as you can use potions to permanently increase the upper limit or replenish the current balance.

You can also use enchanting books to enchant magic wands for energy saving or multiple spellcasting, which is the key to turning many weak magic spells around. But some magic is very rare, you need scrolls to learn.
